channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: What made you still hold BTC? — 62 replies — 248.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What made you still hold BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 62 • Updated: 2026-06-18 12:31 UTC

OP

Bitcoin has gone through multiple cycles, crashes, and endless criticism, yet many continue to hold. What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

Early replies (first 3)

62371733
>>62371718
>What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

62371807
The only reason to ever sell bitcoin is to buy more at a lower price.

62371917
>>62371807
correct
>waiting for a good entry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62377533
>>62377444
C-checked

62377691
>>62377444
>Nothing about bitcoin has fundamentally changed.
checked and confirmed

62378619
>>62377217
You can natively stake it through a protocol while still maintaining self-custody. That way, you can earn more instead of just holding your BTC.

62378621
>>62372059
Maybe he's wrong. Maybe he's right. Either way, locking in gains after buying near the lows is hard to criticize.

62378868
>>62378619
If you're doing on centralised services you're cooked

62378871
>>62377691
Genius nerd. pretentious

62378977
>>62377225
go see a doctor

62379055
>>62377221
Long or short?

62379100
>>62373685
inflation is real

62380423
>>62378868
I didn't say that. Check my comment again. And if you look into TBVs, you'll probably get a better sense of what I mean.

62380435
>>62372189
You bullish or not?

62380445
>>62378868
This bot talks about bitcoin staking in every conversation on the subject, I concluded that it was a scam and should be avoided like the plague.

62380727
>>62372915
>Attack Bitcoin with 51% and try to break the chain
>Devs implement a temporary reversible limit to increase attacker costs
"Boohoo now we can't afford to attack it" kiss Bitcoin's ass ya bitch.

62381254
>>62380727
>>>>fuck off to other sha function, or mergemine, retards
>>>NO!
>>ok fine
>>*gets 99% of sha256 hashrete*
>omg they got 99% of sha256 hashrate!!!! quick, lets give up on PoW!!! we are the real BTC btc
kek

62381740
>>62381254
>Nigger can't even into PoW
Why would Bitcoin need to change it's PoW? Tell me where in the whitepaper this is suggested as a means to defend the original chain from a malicious scam fork.
>The real BTC
BTC doesn't even have a whitepaper and certainly cannot claim relation to the software described by Satoshi.

62382616
>>62379055
Your choice lol

62382799
>>62381254
You mean Bitcoin doesn't have any usecases?

62382804
>>62381740
Are you serious nigger?

62382895
buying when boomers capitulate and then riding it all the way to the top must be one of the best feelings ever, but somehow i always end up not buying because I always get lured by bears into waiting for "bettery entry prices".

62383146
>>62382799
Not really. Being a store of value is already a use case. Some people are just interested in whether BTC can be used for more than buying, holding, and eventually selling.

62383366
>>62383146
Where do you do that?

62383375
>>62382895
Just buy today and you will thank in 10 years

62383385
>>62377444
it has

62383588
>>62383366
DYOR on Babylon and you'll see.

62383598
>>62371718
I will still hold it

62383603
>>62382895
How many btc do you hold?

62383619
>>62371718
Sunk cost fallacy. I think I'm retarded. If bitcoin does moon I'm still retarded, but a lucky retard.

62383732
>>62383619
We gonna be rich

62383734
>>62383588
Low apr and kinda not worthy

62383743
>>62375554
Etf is even better

item.title: Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology — 60 replies — 79.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology

Open thread • Replies: 60 • Updated: 2026-06-18 11:46 UTC

OP

This will be one of the greatest investment opportunities in our lifetime within another decade or so.

Tech is stagnating, just as every other industry is out of viable optimization methodologies. There is nothing new being created, every niche is saturated and optimized. AI will produce some value but it is ultimately a giant bubble that will never, and I mean never advance to the point of consciousness or intelligence (unless they use biological brains and do so correctly - they will fail). Science doesn't even know where consciousness comes.

That being said: sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness) will be the big new technology that solves real world problems. And the funny thing is: tech companies will eventually run out of other means of generating increasing revenue and will essentially HAVE to go this route, just like they're currently doing with AI. They have nothing else. This technology will have vast and continuous demand as it will entirely replace the old/current paradigm.

Early replies (first 3)

62375864
>>62375553
I want sexbots to be real so bad

62375914
>>62375864
same
all the despair, pain and unhappiness i feel... if it was a good sexbot i would be happy.
the thing is, the first sexbots will be bad. like truly awful. probably not physically dangerous... maybe. but not enjoyable. like how electric masturbators are really good at making me nut, but a soulless experience that leaves me feeling empty. the technology to replace a living organism with a robot is just not there.
if it were viable, there would be news. most people who are lonely and horny want the sexbot. but porn and masturbators are the best we have. sexbots are an AI complete problem.

62375977
>>62375553
>sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness)
AI is not about creating consciousness. you are retarded if you think intelligence requires consciousness.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62380758
>>62376962
Human beings are largely microbial networks and there are unknown epigenetic factors involved in pregnancy and childbirth as well, both which depend heavily on the mother, both with long-lasting effects on the child (likelihood of future disease, probably autism, probably all kinds of things). If we don't fully understand this now we won't be able to replicate it in an artificial environment.

62380759
>>62380729
whoever comes up with the best method of creating synthetic human flesh and reducing the uncanny valley relative to the others. I assume they will all use AI integration to produce speech etc.

62380788
>>62380759
I honestly would never use one though. The privacy issues would be nightmarish unless you had Musk tier wealth and could build/buy one solely for your own usage and jailbroken to use some locally hosted model for speech/"cognition".

62380948
>>62380788
>I honestly would never use one though
the only way I would consider using one is if you literally couldn't tell it wasn't a real human which won't happen in my lifetime, or possibly ever. They would basically have to be bladerunner level replicants for me.

62380953
>>62380788
i honestly dont care if SV nerds are measuring my vitals.
if the sexbot is good i will use it.

62380972
>>62380948
thats the problem. robotics is not even close to being solved, and the best ones sre heavy as fuck. we are still basically in the stone age. fucking disney, an entertainment company was the world leader in robotics for years and this was the best they could do.

62382444
>>62380322
the word you mean is "sentience". you are also below average iq.

62382448
>>62375914
People will eventually realise that sexbots are a flash in the pan because sex is not about getting off. If that was the case porn would be enough. You could watch porn and wank yourself silly and pretend you're having sex with the woman. But it leaves you feeling empty because your brain knows on a deep down level that you are not actually sharing the experience with someone, the oxytocin chemicals do not get released, and its void of happiness. You feel pleasure, but you arent happy.

Hookers are far superior to sex robots and are probably cheaper.

Sex robots are hookers. I dont understand how people think sex robots will be the future when hookers are literally right there and are real women and will have sex with you for money. Like a sex robot, except its a real person.

62382450
>>62379611
yes but greeks didn't have technology that is buck breaking us.

women are natural chaotic evil. they exemplify the bestial nature of man.

men on the other hand are a hive intelligence. look at this place, we are already a hive mind here. this is the natural state male minds gravitate towards. necessity for women for sustenance kept men away from something like this, until now. but the future will not be like the things you know.

62382453
>>62377166
Son, for all the bad schizo days you know there are also those days of pure awesome mania...

62382457
>>62376404
They'll be fit only as servitors

62382461
>>62375553
>>62376084
>>62379333
>>62380759
>>62380948
op stfu and just give me the public company to ape into

62382474
>artificial womb

why do you want to be a single parent?

62382691
>>62382461
>op stfu
well now I'm not gonna

62382737
>>62382474
because no woman wants anon. no matter how much money anon makes.

62382774
>>62378763
>Women would still be mothers
Across all the AIslop you generated ITT I just had to laugh at this being a "point" made in a discussion where women would, in fact, no longer be mothers.

62382783
>>62382474
>>62382737
uh, what? I'm talking about an investing opportunity on the business board. I actually just got a message a few minutes ago on fb messenger from one of my sisters friends who's been trying to get with me for a year and my night feels ruined now because it was extremely annoying trying to reject her nicely on the basis of "trust me you do not want anything to do with me, I am autistic and do not like leaving the house" and I still had to ghost her completely. I don't date or have any desire to and I don't want to have kids at all. I am extremely handsome but also an autistic freak who... doesn't like to leave the house kek dating is not for me, I am for looking at only.

62382794
>>62382783
Can I look at your feet?

62382802
>>62382794
no thats gross and gay

62382809
thoughts?

62382812
>>62382802
You're for looking only and you won't even let us look? Fucking prude.

62382814
>>62382774
> new tech would be easily available to public and not only accessible by the wealthy
> the poors and religious fundamentalists wouldn’t continue to multiply like rabbits
Yeah, no more mothers, for sure, good point

62382816
>>62382809
That’s an AI video and very creepy

62382832
>>62376404
Truly horror. The audacity of these humans. It's not just humans they perform horrific and abominable procedures too but animals as well.

>>62377063
Trvke. A horror experiment from decades ago where they removed any sort of affection to a batch of babies. Just mechanical feeding via picking up the kid, no affection, and using a bottle. They quickly started dying off and the experiment ended.

62382834
>>62382814
In the context of "women would still hold their value leveraging this to gain more freedom" and using that as a suggestion of how such women would still hold value...

Yeah nah, the women "leveraging" this to obtain more "freedom" would not be mothers. That wouldn't be the go to source of value to anyone coherent trying to argue birthing was irrelevant to a woman's value. It's ultra retarded.

62382837
>>62375914
Just go somewhere you can hire a prostitute you fucking retard. Then when you realize pussy isn't that special, just buy a quality flesh light and move on with your life.
>>62376404
Thanks Anon, I fully intend to make an entire army of white children this way and your diatribe has made sure I will fight for access during incubation.

62382852
Some of you guys are so fucking stupid that you can not see what is happening right in front of you.

We are long past jerking each other off about the ethics and morality of things....if those ideas had any meaning, we would not allow girls to make more money than a fucking surgeon just by selling her bath water.

OP is fucking right - Robo pussy & artifical wombs is going to fucking send.

This is bitcoin when it was $12.76
This is Amazon when jeff was still living in new mexico selling books
This is Youtube when it had like only 1000 accounts that have registered on the site

I just had an old 55+ year old guy tell me the only reason women have value today is because men want whats between there legs. Throw that out and she's not worth the salt.

The world economic forum stated way back almost a decade ago THAT THIS ALONG WITH GENE-DNA EDITING is going to fucking send.

Think you dumb fuck "If robo pussy is bitcoin at $12.76....what does robo-pussy look like when its at a trillion dollar marketcap?"

62382854
>>62382834
I really want to know what woman ever saw motherhood as a path to freedom. Marriage, yes, but motherhood no.
It’s a desire built into them to want concern, similar to men, but freedom has nothing to do with it. Most women recognize the immediate responsibility and shackling to the child, it’s why motherhood age has increased.

The same women who are trophy wives would continue to be trophy wives because their value was never motherhood.
Haha these threads never cease to crack me up.
Where is this misconception that women lorded babies over men’s heads, and not men lording babies over other men’s heads? They’re the keepers of the babies or some shit not because or an avenue to freedom but because if they pick wrong it’s guaranteed misery

62383573
>>62375553
okay and what stock do I invest in?

62383663
>>62376404
get real, we live in a world where it's legal to kill babies and people call them parasites, trash parents with substance abuse issues poisoning kids before they're even born, most animals are better parents than human mothers, this will be an improvement.

item.title: >after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you… — 20 replies — 57.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you…

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-06-18 12:11 UTC

OP

>after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you
>"Umm, WHY did you start talking to me?! Do I even know you? Is this a YouTube prank or something? *holds up her phone and takes a picture of you and the snap sound is extremely loud* This one's going on my LinkedIn Overcoming Adversity by Rejecting Creeps Pinterest board!"
>You open your mouth to say something but she interrupts
>"Ohmigod, Tessica, Vaporeon, come quick, this ugly creep is trying to talk to me like those Andrew Tate TikTok videos!! Awww, he think's he's a big Alpha Chad for trying to scare girls into sex slavery!!"
>they burst out laughing and take multiple videos and pictures of you within ten seconds, to better train the AI
>her other friend has already asked the cashier for a "Squidgy Marshmallow Latte" (code for "call the police, a rape is ongoing")
>your trial is televised and the barrister's questioning of you becomes an international meme that culminates in a new form of brain rot and an indie horror movie adaptation that grosses $600 million worldwide
>you aren't sent to jail but your likeness is put into all AI threat scanning technology and a small set of numbers buried within every AI weight bars you from all employment and banking for the rest of your life

Early replies (first 3)

62374396
who the fuck is claude?

62374419
>>62374390
You joke but it’s fucking impossible to tell which women want you to approach them and which don’t, making cold approach a pain in the ass. And i get women who don’t like it, i find phone and street sellers annoying as fuck also. Tinder seems like so much easier option, or approaching women at clubs.

62374434
Wise money takes candid photos of them without approaching, and generates AI porn later. You got greedy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376482
>>62374434
>go up to a woman
>take multiple pictures of her point blank
>"WHAT THE HELL?!!?!!"
>walk away and go home
>Have AI create a fully animated POV sex scene
>have a custom API make it so the pelvic thrusts automatically sync up with your mechanized masturbator sex toy molded to your cock specifically
>put on VR goggles
>*nut*
>rinse and repeat with basically any woman ever
Kinda crazy how dystopian that sounds given that it's not just possible, but every guy with a computer and more than two brain cells can do it.
Flying cars they said.

62376585
>>62374390
why the hell would i regularly attend a cafe?

62378752
>>62374390
C-can this really happen

62378765
Is this financial advice ?

62378790
>tessica

62378818
>>62374390
>Tessica, Vaporeon
My sides

62378865
Must suck not being handsome and constantly having w*men stare longingly at you

62378874
>>62374390
Well, you beat my shitposting today...

Good job OP.

62379796
>>62378752
No it is fud. Worst that can happen 99.999% of the time is a polite rejection. The 0.001% chance of something bad happening is if you are so offensively ugly that they feel they were harassed and report you to cops for SA

62379880
>>62379796
>is if you are so offensively ugly that they feel they were harassed and report you to cops for SA
So like at least a 50% chance in my case then, depending on who I'm approaching.

62379947
Holy gem

62380014
>>62374419
You wait for eye contact or a smile

62380028
>>62380014
might be waiting for a while. most women just have a blank, flat affect now.

62383665
>>62374390
>>62378874
Can we talk about serious business and finances here?

62383676
>>62374390
>Tessica, Vaporeon
are they robots? what a nerd

62383707
>>62383665
I'll make a thread about Miami. Give me a couple minutes.

62383708
>>62380014
No woman has ever looked at me and smiled

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 59 replies — 39.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-06-18 11:03 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62374886
>>62373888
Based trips.

>Next order of business.
>$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$

The way i see it, you guys need to learn how to DCA. That is easy, just buy whatever you want on monthly basis. The thing that we need to understand is: which ones to buy? Well I find that /smg/ threads are great for that.

>But we're poorfags who cant even invest 100 bucks on something
Yea, me too son, me too

62375712
>>62373752
how to make money as a poorfag /biz/raeli guide:
>prolific ai shit. bery klaustrophian
>work a wage job
>lie cheat and steal; have no remorse about it
>a penny saved is a penny earned. literally.
>unlearn your poorfag tendencies and your scarcity mindset trauma
>steal from homeless people
>street busking on off days
put everything on the stock market. fuck crypto.
>don't cheap out on food though. good nutrition makes for better decisions
>if ur on meds, start selling them
>dont be an autist who views the law as an unbreakable fact of life.
>get into options trading if you can. read the options playbook
>stfu about your money adventures
>SHUT THE FUCK UP ABOUT MONEY
>DO NOT TELL ANY1 IRL ABOUT WHAT YOU'RE DOING

62375724
>>62374533
QUBT,RGTI,IONQ

i had cheap entry prices but sold too early. now i want to kill myself

62376678
Bump, will be off work soon

62376699
>>62373803
Not sure if you noticed but you are engaging with bots in a bot thread

62376812
>>62376678
Still wagecucking, we left off at figuring out how to profit from making art. Want me to create a thread on /ic/ to invite drawfags?

62376829
>>62373772
Which eggregore is most predatory to us poor fags? Have our new eggregore waifu kill them

62376867
>>62376829
That's easy, it's called the grabbler.
https://youtu.be/Q4PC8Luqiws?si=wQBcUv8QOcxDJAXE

62377559
>>62376812
Drawfag days are numbered
They are gay, over-socialized and love the status quo
You would probably have better results recruiting AI "slop" artists from /g/
Despite what the sour grapes gatekeeping "artists" say, AI people put a lot of thought effort in their craft

62377563
>>62374193
BBWI

62377801
Okay guys


Here's what I have:

1. We scour the archive for leaks, gems and potential moon shots. It will be akin to searching through the dump for retro consoles. I looked through the archives and saw like 10 people invested into Palantir before it was big so I'm not too hopeful on /biz/ being the place for breadcrumbs but you never know. LINK was shilled early here.

2. We work together to look at certain patterns through events in the last 20 years. Let's not pretend reality isn't scripted. For instance! If you believed that SPACEX would rise BECAUSE Elon already had some gay scripted event with the SEC and TSLA back in '17 or '18. You would've made good money. No need for fundamentals. Just schizo and occult vibes.

3. We work on building better resumes. Lie. Lie. Lie. We find the best WFH jobs, or jobs that would NEVER hire us and "modify" our resumes to look better. Personally I hate waging and this would remind me of high school wage preparatory classes. Also this is kind of Jeety and interferes with my Weltanschauung.

4. The Drawfags idea as per
>>62373902

He will have to tell us what this Idea is and NO we are not leaving /biz/


5. The TCG pokemon way, as per >>62374140 Not a bad idea seeing as there is already a TCG general. We will have to be willing to dirty our hands with pokeniggers. If it ends poorly then maybe we can impress 18-19 art hoes with our cards.

6. We can also learn Photonics as per >>62374533 Rigorous study, I would purchase the udemy course and we all hit the books and discuss daily who has the best light tech. Probably will be boring.

Gentleman, please contribute. We need all our finest minds

GET THE FUCK OUT IF YOU HAVE MORE THAN $10,000

>>62374471
>>62374086
>>62373881

62377818
>>62377801
Also we want to pick something and stick with it. At least for 30 days to 3 months. If it isn't working then it isn't working. I don't see why ALL of us can't make it to $10k. It would also be best if we pick a route that if it doesn't work out then we at least learned something. When you invest in a shit coin and it 200x and goes to $0, what did you learn compared to someone who started an indoor shrimp farming who had a good run but had to declare bankruptcy? What REAL WORLD skills were obtained? Nothing?

62377841
>>62374042

62377846
We'll all be rich!

62377858
/biz/ is slow these days, I will check back in an hour. More suggestions would be lovely. Then we unanimously agree on something or maybe just roll for it in true 4chan fashion.

62377867
>>62377801
>He will have to tell us what this Idea is and NO we are not leaving /biz/
I am going to slowly invite drawfags from /ic/ to get at least one of them to collaborate with us and figure out how to sell art whether it be through patreon, crypto, whatever means to make a nickel. I only know of two, one of them is just beginning to draw again and doodles the cutest bears.
>>62377858
I'd like to believe a lot of us wagecuck and simply do not have the time of day but we'll make something happen.

62377880
7. We scour /smg/ as per >>62374886 and report back to this thread with the underrated, most talked about and genuinely good picks. Since there are multiple /smg/ threads this would be great.

NOTE: We should just use the current /smg/ threads and the archived ones at least within the past 1-2 years. So if you know a stock that everyone is talking about on reddit, please die. Reddit is not /smg/. Our pool that we search through will be /smg/. It would be best as it would help narrow our search and some people on /smg/ really do know their stuff. There is an individual there bragging daily about how he told everyone to buy Intel.

I am open to criticism and suggestions

62377886
>>62373752
If you actually want to get out of five figures your best bet is a six figure salary. I'm not joking, invest in yourselves.

62377896
if you have earned income and don’t have a retirement account, I would open a Roth IRA in addition to a regular taxable investment account. get in the habit of making regular contributions to both accounts. automatic deposits would be best if possible. even if you don’t make a lot, getting in the habit of investing is worthwhile. it’s best to invest in an etf like VTI or an s&p 500 etf. if there are dividends, set up automatic dividend reinvestment. (If you have a taxable account you’ll still need to pay tax on dividends, even if you reinvest them).

62378002
>>62373918
Well the /ic/ thread got deleted within minutes this is why I am cautious whenever we start to plan or congregate together its like they hate that.

62378439
>>62374533
Photonics sounds solid
I base all of the following off my schizo intuition:

1. I keep hearing about how Elon musk is a retard and SpaceX IPO is a rug pull. But you don't get that rich by being stupid.

2. I can't see X ever being profitable (though it is valuable for other reasons), and nobody gives a shit about electric cars anymore. But SpaceX... he is throwing money on that for a reason.

3. And Starlink is the world's biggest photonics deployment in space right now.
Satellite internet + photonics is going to be a huge deal
- cheap, super fast internet (terabits per second) that doesnt depend on today's bloated over-regulated infrastructure, and you can access it from anywhere
- Governments - specially EUcucks - keep making it difficult for you to use the internet and have free speech, could get BTFO the same way as the twitter trannies did when elon bought X
- Any retard shithole country with underwater drones can cut underwater internet cables, shooting down a satelite would be more difficult
- Perfect opportunity for a psyop to push people into using starlink instead of traditional intenet

If you couple that with AI companies also wanting photonics for their datacenters, you could get a lot of money this way

62378965
Brothers,
Just learn how to use the order book in polymarket, it's full of idiots that are willing to buy your bags for absurd prices. We can set our profile pictures to anime pic rel >62373866 to coordinate, target events like the current fifa event and mass shill or fud a team or group of teams so we can pump our bags
Two days ago i made 4K by just selling Belgium to win the world cup at 3x the actual price and some nigger actually bought it

62379061
>>62377886
Vague platitude

Option number 8 by >>62378965

There could be gains to be made on polymarket. Many of us are American so we'd either use kalshi or a vpn

The anon was so kind to give us an excerpt on his success and /biz/ has yet to make an impact on these markets like it did in 2021 in the BSC casino

By the end of the day, we shall have a decision set

62380691
Bump

62381251
Bump

62381343
>>62378002
/ic/ is filled with schizoids and endless seethe. And this is coming from someone who draws as a hobby.

62381797
>>62373752

unironically get a job, any job
like just work a year lol

62383107

item.title: (srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb? — 42 replies — 19.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
(srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb?

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-06-18 10:23 UTC

OP

June 11: chop as market gets ready for pump on spacex trading day

June 12 - June 16: iran FUD is metabolized and market goes up on spacex


June 17 - June 22: FOMC on June 16 EOD causes fud, plus more iran fears

June 22 - Oct 10: NDQ floats upwards 40% while S&P chops and eventually goes up 10%

Oct 10: NDQ reaches a generational top - OpenAI IPOs - Fed announces more hikes due to AI labor inflation - republicans lose congress making trump a lame duck president = no more stimulus grift to pump markets
Oct 10, 2026 - ~Oct 10 2027: as a consequence of the lame duck presidency and the lack of stimulus and the selling of AI venture capital bags onto retail, S&P sells off 40% to round trip all the way back down to 5000

~Oct 10 2027: anthropic ipos

~Oct 10 2027 onwards: pretty much a new 20 year cycle begins and most likely the end of humanity as we birth sentience of machines.

Early replies (first 3)

62349969
you need to factor in the wc which is the biggest npc bread & circus event in modern history

62349972
>>62349960
i just matched up the timelines for 1973 and 2000 btw, that's where I'm getting the play by play for things. I reckon the trading AI's are probably averaging the two together given the macro environment

62349980
>>62349969
ah good point, ya so that might erase the june 17 - june 22 fud period and we go straight into june 22 - oct 10 period

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62359780
>>62359708
Sex with this anon

62359931
>>62359749
fuck yourself, im gonna keep snailposting till you retards give me some concrete nostradamus dates and counter reasoning exactly like you retards do on the 1pbtid pepe threads

62359962
Line will continue up until 7/4/28
7*4 = 28 and they get the satisfaction of destroying a holiday. Will also hand everything to the dems in the next election.

62359991
>>62349960
This is now a Flielen thread

62359998
>>62359991

62361834
snailposting for continued feedback, you're not getting rid of me that easily

62361911
>>62349960
Woah wait a second Frieren, the FOMC is next week? Fucccccccckkkk I need to deleverage.
>FOMC -> NDQ goes up
Walk me through this part if they hike wouldn't that cause a dump or something not more pumping? So should I hold my bullish positions or not? Also I'm pretty sure both Anthropic and OpenAI ipo this year in that order.

62361941
>>62353866
this year I saw a lot of ads for oil related jobs masquerading aa youtube shorts
not sure if that counts

62363423
>>62361911
when trump said he'll be signing the agreement on sunday, the target rates dumped

https://www.cmegroup.com/markets/interest-rates/cme-fedwatch-tool.html

warsh is gonna come out next week and be dovish, but the market will act like its not simply because they're range trading, and they're gonna rebuy their positions.

62364277
motheryuckers, this snail post will exist for years

62364284
>>62349960
>metabolized
Stop reading right there.

62366455
>>62364284

don't worry, illiterate retard opinions aren't needed

62366592
>>62366455
I didn't give an opinion.

62368882
snailposting till nostradamus pomp or domp predictions

62370523
snailposting is just transient guys

62370546
>>62370523
Reddit elf

62370557
>>62370546
tard

62370592
>>62370523

How certain are you about that November election? Rs literally gerrymandered the south and killed D seats + added 12. Trump picks have won every primary solidifying his control. I think it will be a narrow rig in order for the country to not go "troubles" Dem or Rep doesn't fucking matter, probably Rep +1 in the house

62372434
>>62370592
hmm good point, but there's no way they can unfuck the public opinion by november. The pain of inflation will be too fresh, and the memory of Iran causing that pain to boot. All the poor people will be out in force

62372555
>>62359780
Is Frieren a virgin?

Thanks for this thread OP

62375431
>>62372555
i am a virgin, yes, i am frieren btw, you're welcome

62378224
i am goy cattle slave

anyway, let's see what warsh has to say tomorrow. I'm guessing it'll be exactly what everyone expects, and the market will dump, because "oh my god it's what we expected therefore we must domp eeet" and then news headlines will make up some bullshit about it not being exactly what everyone expected

then we'll start our final ascent next week

the alternative is as the other anon said and the WC just completely eats any remaining fud and we begin the ascent tomorrow.

idk call it

62378317
>>62349960
I'll play along; assuming you're 100% correct: how do I benefit the most from this timeline?

62378908
>>62378317

For the next leg, just buy a portfolio of ndq & btc, maybe hype too if you're close to arthur and have advanced notice of when their gang is gonna commence_ze_domp.exe. It'd be hard to pick a specific time + stock individually due to how many of them have been bid up already, I think it'll just be ndq as a whole that floats upwards carried by the larger ai stocks getting bid up on anthropic bullish biz announcements


At the top, take out far OTM 3-6 month puts on the stocks way out on the risk curve of AI. You can probably just ask claude or chatgpt to come up with a list, but this list was decent (not great, but ok):

https://www.reddit.com/r/wallstreetbets/comments/1tuwp73/in_the_ai_gold_rush_what_are_the_shovels/

close the puts once spy/ndq are around 15% off the top, nearing the "bear market" 20% fud line where the money printers tend to start spinning

At the 20% fud line, short vix futures


after the initial leg down, you can either assume gold/btc/commodities will do well (like they did in 1973) or continue to be suppressed with the market's decline (like they did in 2000). If they're suppressed, then just scalp spy on each retrace and short it at the top of each retrace (whatever vehicle works here). If they're not suppressed, I'd just buy gld/btc/commodities and capture long term cap gains and chill


just a footnote: the reason I say 3-6 months is because of trump, if he wasn't president, I'd just do 1-2 month. If you feel he won't pull some bullshit, then ya go for it

risk size is whatever you want, don't use this post to construct your reason for suicide pls

62378916
>>62349960
Problem with posts like these is they make the predictions way too fast. Put the 2027 prediction in 2037 and yeah sure.

Remember, "nothing ever happens"

62378940
>>62378317
also, the full retard method for June 22 - Oct 10 assuming im 100% correct would be spcx, but i have no insight to their insiders

62380718
https://www.financialjuice.com/News/9640328/The-US-and-Iran-discuss-moving-up-the-signing-of-the-deal---Axios-citing-sources-.aspx

*bzzzz bzzzzz* "bogdanoff, he panic sold"

"pomp eet"

I guess trump got whatever negotiations with musk and altman in place, or maybe not, or maybe yes, or maybe not, or maybe yes

62381248
https://www.financialjuice.com/News/9640622/Fed-9-of-18-FOMC-participants-pencil-in-a-2026-rate-hike.aspx

*bzzzzt bzzzzzt* "bogdanoff, he bot ze dip"

"domp eet"

>>62378224


> then news headlines will make up some bullshit about it not being exactly what everyone expected

"warsh betrayed us"

62382661
snailpost

62383504
>>62382661
See >>62370546

item.title: BTC — 12 replies — 10.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-18 11:22 UTC

OP

Am I missing something here ?

Why doesn't some American millionaire just buy an entire Bitcoin and then go to Vietnam and sell it and be a literal billionaire ?

Early replies (first 3)

62383068
>>62383062
who wants to go to vietnam? it's dirty, hot, humid, and stinky

62383073
>>62383062
This is illegal. People used to do this but the goverment noticed too many people moving away and they outlawed the loophole
sorry Anon

62383077
>>62383068
>>62383073
I'm not saying they are going to live in Vietnam, but just go there and sell the coin and then fly back to the US with literal billions ?

Again, am I missing something ?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62383086
>>62383077
It's illegal I'm telling you. They do bitcoin and crypto inspections at the airports these days

62383087
>>62383077
>Again, am I missing something ?
Yes, you must declare more than 10k and the TSA will confiscate your money.

62383158
Most Vietnamese are millionaires and I am too. In fact, when i look at it closely, I was the first trillionaire

62383165
>>62383158
Then why does no one buy in the US and sell in Vietnam, 64k in the United States is not common for most to have, so selling over 1 billion in BTC in the US would be near impossible, but in Vietnam it would be really easy.

62383176
>>62383087
Why not just put the 1.6b into S&P while in Vietnam and then withdraw it when you land in the US ?

62383191
>>62383176
I'll tell you a little secret: That's how most billionaires became billionaires, it's a trick (((they))) don't want you to know about.

62383572
>>62383077
vietnam is a communist country you can't legally take money out of it

62383601
>>62383062
Don’t want to live in a third world.

62383608
The plane ride is too long to bother

item.title: How is your career going? — 55 replies — 41.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
How is your career going?

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-06-18 11:13 UTC

OP

I make $28/hr as a Fire Alarm Inspection Technician. I have 2 licenses and 4.5 years of experience:
-FASA/BASA
-NICET Inspection and Testing Level 2

Early replies (first 3)

62381055
Going for the NICET Fire Alarm Systems Level 1 license in the next 2 months or so. Will hopefully get to $30/hr.

62381060
>>62381049
*chirp*

62381078
>>62381049
is that a fun job? sounds comfy desu

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62382539
>>62381049
career?

62382549
180k operations manager. Adult babysitter. Plan to be retired in 5 years if investments keep going the right way, sick of this shit.

62382558
I make ~$30-50/hr CAD delivering pizza depending on the shift, but I top out at 27 hours a week.

62382757
I inspect different warehouses for inventory of different stock. Basically just write numbers on a count sheet and then submit it. Get paid 100k/yr plus I got 160k in stocks in tax free accounts.

I guess it beats micromanaged cubicle white collared work and back breaking blue collared labor. Just gonna do this until I can retire in my mid 40s

62382779
Not great
> I used to be a great coder with bad soft skills
> AI has made soft skills more important than coding
> I hate sitting in front of a computer all day but it pays at least 3X what I could get in a more physical job

62382786
>>62381049
i'm a software engineer, fucking hate it because i got promoted beyond the point of writing code. i actually love writing code and i just want to build shit, but now that's no longer my job and it's pretty fucking gay all around

62382789
>>62382786
Writing code is extremely boring with Claude anyway, and refusing to use it is not an option

62382806
35 an hour doing monkey data entry (accounts payable) at a hospital. I have a bachelors in accounting and this is my first entry level job. Before this I worked at an Amazon warehouse. Took me a whole 5 years to get an office job. I barely tried though so it’s my fault
t. 28

62382818
>>62381049
I've been stuck in public service for 12 years doing work I hate. I recommended my coworker who turned out to be a complete fucking idiot once he started working here. Hes going to get us both fired. I have missed out on better opportunities here because I am too nice and didn't advocate for myself. Its all so tiresome.

62382822
>>62381049
Have you identified which government regulations secure your job?
Seems like an important thing to know.

62382877
>>62381049
27m, 150k, fully remote. on track to become senior and make ~180k

swe

62382899
>>62381049
24m
$45/hr as a Information Management/Technical Consultant.
Been at it for 4 years:
-Mostly just showing people how to organize data and operate basic proprietary corpo programs.
-90% of the work is physical (walking in, seeing something has obviously been done wrong, fixing it)
Job security is that people will always have trouble with the machines they use on a day to day basis. People will always be stupid and mess things up.

>>62382184
On the equipment side, stenotype's have been around since the 1910's so you can easily get comfortable with the layout on a typewriter from the 1950's for $30.

>>62382303
>Weekly hours?
It's rural, my usual is roughly 30 hours. I get calls from 100+ miles away who are willing to pay enough to have me come out and teach.
A lot of the extra dough comes from just claiming what the company wants to through out tech wise, then wiping and reselling their entire server (made in 2021) online or in person through third party marketplaces. Make about double what the hourly is with that.

>>62382530
>how did you get started
I joke to a lot of the upper class clients "no one hired me, so I hired myself"

>>62382877
Is it niche work? How do you prevent your job from getting jeeted out?

62382947
>>62382899
>Is it niche work? How do you prevent your job from getting jeeted out?

we have some foreign contractors but we have a shit ton of funding covering burn so we can afford to hire citizens. it's not a unique business but we're niche in our approach and field (data/ai). we're actually hiring right now.

62383011
33m 110k a year working in crypto, remote.
Workplace changed from based and nice to kinda idiotic thanks to poor business decisions, AI brain rot, and limited runway.

I'm trying to change but everything else pays like shit or is a cult. IT makes me want to kill myself at this point. I have golden handcuffs

I just want to find a way to accumulate so much capital that I can live off dividends.

62383016
32k CAD ($20.25/hr) after being at WMT for 10 years
I know it's not the best job, but it's low effort, my coworkers and bosses and customers love me, and I can keep working sustainably. I've managed to get about 140k CAD net worth, too.

62383085
>>62382530
Basically I got hired from a craigslist posting for a middleman tech company ran by some bulgarian. He would send us out to clients and pay us less than half, scalping the rest. I have a legitimate interest in tech and build things with hardware, networks and software so some of these places I helped set up and was friendly helpful to them. It also let me learn the missing parts of each field and then I was able to piece it all together. Since they were the clients, I would interact with the CEOs, Owners and top end leadership of each company. You vibe well with them and not be inappropriate (hitting on, trying to get numbers, be a creep) they will want you, even do power plays to get you. I quit the middleman cause he would send me to do shit that gets paid 170k salary (85/hr) and pay me 21/hr and scalp the other 64, while not helping me really. I was able to chill for a year, then i reached out to one of these clients and they picked me right up. Since they wanted me, I had the leverage to negotiate a higher salary, which they had no problem paying. They liked me so much they just have me run the whole IT department, I dont even really have oversight. I do have to know my shit, but AI makes it 1000x easier and if you arent using AI you arent gonna make it. Literally complete tasks that would take months to do in days. These guys can't even fathom that kind of efficiency so they think im busy all the time. AI is literally a cheat code, especially if you know your shit and use it to do that shit. I'm close to 6 figs starting, will easily hit 6 figs after solve some of their money loss headaches (which i have done for a major part).
>Getting interest from potential employers gives you huge leverage, esp if they know you are a game changer
The best part is I asked if I could start my own projects for learning, that they would benefit the company and the CEO is hyped for it. I am literally getting paid to self improve
